sec.title: Introduction
sec.p: Intervertebral disc degeneration is a leading cause of low-back pain.
HIF1A is implicated in NP cell survival.

sec.title: Methods
sec.p: Human NP cells were cultured under 1% O2.

sec.title: Results
sec.p: NF-κB signalling was suppressed under low oxygen.

sec.title: Conclusions
sec.p: HIF1A drives NP-cell adaptation to hypoxia.
